title: ALP System Manifest v1
description: The single derived projection of a board.yaml that `west alp-build` emits to build/system-manifest.yaml. It is the IDE / tool CONTRACT for a (possibly multi-image) project: one entry per per-core slice with its runtime, build directory, output artefact, and flash recipe, plus the IPC links and helper MCUs. Tools read THIS instead of re-deriving folder layout / build wiring from board.yaml + the SoM presets. Generated by scripts/alp_orchestrate.py; this schema and that emitter move in lockstep (a check gate validates the emitter output against this contract). Stability: schema_version 1 is additive-only (new optional fields only); a breaking change ships as schema_version 2 through a deprecation cycle, so consumers should tolerate unknown fields.

slices.description: One entry per per-core image. core_id + os + the build/flash wiring the IDE needs to build, run, debug, and flash each image without re-deriving anything.

os.description: Resolved runtime (zephyr | yocto | baremetal | off); the value-set is owned by metadata/schemas/board.schema.json cores.<core>.os.

app.description: Relative path to this image's app source dir (binds the core to its sub-folder).

build_dir.description: Per-slice build directory (build/<core_id>-<os>); populated by fan-out.

output_artefact.description: Built image path; populated after a successful build.

flash_method.description: Backend the flasher dispatches to (e.g. zephyr_west_flash, yocto_wic_to_sd_or_emmc).

flash_args.description: Method-specific flash arguments (shape varies by flash_method).

ipc.description: Inter-core links (rpmsg / mailbox) with their resolved carve-outs. A blocked link carries status:blocked + reason instead of the carve-out fields.

helper_mcus.description: On-module helper MCUs (e.g. the GD32 bridge) that ship their own firmware image.

flash_args.description: Method-specific flash arguments, or the string 'TBD' when a helper MCU's flash recipe isn't yet finalized in the SoM preset.

boot_order.description: Resolved inter-image boot sequencing (empty until a SoM declares boot_order).

storage.description: Resolved storage partitions (present only when the project declares storage).
